---
applyTo: "**/*.css,**/*.pcss,**/*.postcss"
description: "Apply the repository's Vanilla CSS guidance."
---

Canonical styling guidance lives in `.ai/skills/vanilla-css/SKILL.md` and `.ai/rules/project-architecture.md`.

Use CSS custom properties for reusable tokens, preserve the warm paper link hub feel unless the task says otherwise, and keep hover, focus, and reduced-motion states intentional across directory and tile views.
